[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0011001 3
1 1010000 2
2 1010000 2
3 1010000 2
4 0001110 3
5 0100000 1
6 0000000 a
7 0111101 5

01 10 0000101 2
12 21 0000001 1
23 32 0010000 1
34 43 1010000 2 match 1 2 3
45 54 1010000 2 match 1 2 3
56 65 0000000 a match 6
67 76 0000000 a match 6
70 07 0100000 1 match 5

02 20 0011001 3 match 0
13 31 1000000 1
24 42 0010000 1
35 53 1010000 2 match 1 2 3
46 64 0000000 a match 6
57 75 0000000 a match 6
60 06 0001100 2
71 17 0000000 a match 6

03 30 0010000 1
14 41 1000000 1
25 52 0010000 1
36 63 0000000 a match 6
47 74 0000000 a match 6
50 05 0010000 1
61 16 0000100 1
72 27 0000000 a match 6

04 40 0010000 1
15 51 1000000 1
26 62 0001000 1
37 73 0000000 a match 6
